name: python3-censys
title: python3-censys
summary: easy-to-use and lightweight API wrapper for Censys APIs (censys.io)
description:
easy-to-use and lightweight API wrapper for Censys APIs (censys.io)
An easy-to-use and lightweight API wrapper for Censys APIs (censys.io).
Python 3.8+ is currently supported. This library has been tested on
Python 3.8 and 3.x (Currently version 3.10).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use censys because easy-to-use and lightweight API wrapper for Censys APIs (censys.io).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use censys as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `censys [options] [args]` as documented upstream for censys.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair censys with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `censys --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
